channel.title: NUZU News
channel.description: NUZU: Real News in Real Time. Breaking headlines from 200+ trusted sources.

item.title: Iran's top diplomat says a lack of trust is impeding talks to end war with the US - The Washington Post

AI radio hosts demonstrate why AI can’t be trusted alone - The Verge
Britney Spears’ son Jayden poses on red carpet the same night singer was reported acting 'erratic' at restaurant - Entertainment Weekly
Op-ed: The Middle East is setting Pacific tuna fishing dynamics - SeafoodSource
A.I. and Humans Battle It Out in a Cybersecurity Showdown - The New York Times
Kanye West’s debut concert in India cancelled - The Hindu
Stock markets worldwide drop from records as worries about oil prices rattle the bond market - The Washington Post

CDC Gaming welcomes Passport Technology as a Gold Sponsor of the 2026 Day Zero Party - CDC Gaming
The Trump-Xi Summit Was Remarkably Banal - Foreign Policy
UAE to accelerate oil pipeline project to bypass Strait of Hormuz - Al Jazeera
UAE to accelerate oil pipeline project to bypass Strait of Hormuz - Al Jazeera
Drones are no more eyes in the sky, they are claws in the sky, says IAF Chief - The Hindu
Former college basketball star Sam Dekker joining SEC coaching staff - Yahoo Sports
Sustaining momentum: Latino entrepreneurs and the future of US economic growth - Brookings

Rahul Gandhi will be INDIA bloc’s PM candidate: Revanth Reddy - The Hindu

Google updates its spam rules to include attempts to ‘manipulate’ AI - The Verge

Japan automakers' profits to stall at half of peak level on Iran war - Nikkei Asia
Former Dodgers Champion Justin Turner Determined to Keep Playing Baseball - Yahoo Sports

‘Extremely cruel and tragic’: Iranian director Asghar Farhadi speaks out against state violence and the war - The Guardian
FNDF: A Foreign Developed Market ETF That Emphasizes Fundamental Factor Investing - Seeking Alpha
Jack Antonoff Attacks AI Music Creators in Instagram Letter - Let's Data Science

Friday Harbor becomes first mortgage technology provider to receive AI governance compliance attestation from Brody Gapp - Send2Press
Trump noncommittal to continued Taiwan arms sales after meeting with Xi - Politico

Niall Horan says he's not going to Harry Styles and Zoë Kravitz's wedding - Entertainment Weekly

From a galaxy far, far away to Hollywood Blvd, 'The Mandalorian and Grogu' have arrived for their world premiere. Read more below. - facebook.com

Sovereignty boosts enterprise AI returns, study finds - IT Brief Australia

Bungie outlines plan to save Marathon with Steam player count at less than 15% of launch day peak - TechRadar
